detail: Customer → Gateway → PS → TMS → CBE. Available delivery windows queried. Slot 14:00–16:00 selected.
Customer → Gateway → PS → TMS → CBE. Delivery booking confirmed. Slot locked in TMS and CHG Backend.
PRE-001 — PrePaid · Delivery · 4 items · ฿1,200. Status → Pending
SC → CBE: Sale Order dispatched. Payment amount registered in CHG Backend.
SC → WMS: Sale Order dispatched. Order registered for warehouse picking.
POST /webhooks/wms/pick-started. No BookingConfirmed step — booking pre-confirmed via TMS/CBE. Status → PickStarted
SC → TMS: PickStartedEvent dispatched. TMS notified for driver slot scheduling.
WMS → SC: POS Recalculation request (mid-pick). Current basket: ฿1,200. Can repeat multiple times.
SC → POS: Recalculation forwarded. Promo engine and tax calculation applied.
POS → SC: Amount Recalculation. Final total: ฿1,150 (promo −฿50 applied).
SC → WMS: Updated amount ฿1,150 confirmed back to warehouse.
POST /webhooks/wms/pick-confirmed (basket qty). 4/4 lines fully picked. Status → PickConfirmed
SC → POS: PickConfirmedEvent dispatched. Partial pick notification to POS.
SC → WMS: ABB/Tax Invoice PRE-paid #INV-PRE-001 · ฿1,150. Invoice issued BEFORE TMS dispatches.
SC → TMS: Pick Confirmed (basket qty). Order ready for driver pickup.
POST /webhooks/tms/package-dispatched. TRK-PRE-001 — driver picks up package. Status → OutForDelivery
SC → Gateway: Out for Delivery. Customer notified via app push notification.
POST /webhooks/tms/package-delivered. TRK-PRE-001 delivered to customer. Status → Delivered
SC → Gateway: Delivered. Customer delivery confirmation sent.
STS → SC: Official ABB/Tax Invoice #ABB-2024-PRE-001 · ฿1,150 issued by Settlement Tax System.
SC → Gateway: ABB/Tax Invoice forwarded to customer. Prepaid transaction complete.
